_note: TEMPLATE (ADR-0029, hardened 2026-07-07 model). Copy to config/plant_profiles.local.json (gitignored) and describe YOUR plants. A slowly-changing DIMENSION keyed by the stable plant_id (ADR-0027) — never telemetry. Every field is ABSENT-SAFE (ADR-0028): a minimal profile is plant_id (+ label). PLACEMENT RULE (ADR-0029 s3): a WIRED plant's device/channel/side resolve through the device registry and are NOT stored here; only a SENSORLESS plant carries placement (sensorless: true + ledge + window). Guesses are labelled (species_guess + species_confidence vs an asserted species); observations are dated (provenance). Vocabularies: ADR-0029 s4.

care.rejuvenation_routine: example — quarterly sink soak + leaf spray, 30-min drip-dry

plants.label: p05
plants.species: example asserted species (a recorded nursery sticker — provenance has a chain)

hydrology.drainage_note: example — roots sip from the inner/outer gap

plants.open_questions: example — an honest open question stays a question
